criteria.name: chunked host runtime contract is implemented
continuous/on-chip runtime is explicitly not overclaimed
no mechanism is incorrectly marked on-chip proven

mechanism_rows.claim_boundary: not native on-chip eligibility; host computes delayed credit at chunk boundaries
mechanism_rows.current_claim: confirmed delayed-credit setting and hardware-surviving hard-task bridge in earlier chunked host capsules
mechanism_rows.required_bridge_work: reuse scheduled input and per-step binned readback; verify matured feedback replay under v2.1 tasks

mechanism_rows.claim_boundary: not native memory and not hardware memory until a returned SpiNNaker probe passes
mechanism_rows.current_claim: bounded host-side keyed/multi-slot context memory repairs interference and preserves regression
mechanism_rows.required_bridge_work: carry visible context/decision metadata through chunk scheduler; replay per-step context writes and decisions after binned readback

mechanism_rows.claim_boundary: hardware replay is unproven; priority weighting is not the promoted claim
mechanism_rows.current_claim: correct-binding replay repairs silent reentry and separates wrong-memory controls
mechanism_rows.required_bridge_work: define replay epochs around hardware chunks; prevent replay from fabricating spike readback; log replay events separately from real hardware events

mechanism_rows.claim_boundary: not full world model and not on-chip predictive coding
mechanism_rows.current_claim: bounded host-side predictive-context and predictive-binding evidence through v2.0 guardrails
mechanism_rows.current_location: host metadata/state and diagnostic input injection
mechanism_rows.required_bridge_work: schedule precursor/decision metadata inside chunks; preserve no-label/no-reward preexposure contract; compare against shuffled/wrong-domain controls in hardware probe

mechanism_rows.claim_boundary: not hardware/on-chip routing, language, planning, or general compositional reasoning
mechanism_rows.current_claim: internal host-side composition/routing and working-memory/context binding survive guardrails
mechanism_rows.current_location: host module tables, router scores, and metadata-driven feature injection
mechanism_rows.required_bridge_work: map skill/context events to chunk scheduler; replay module/router updates after feedback; prove pre-feedback route selection with hardware readback

mechanism_rows.claim_boundary: not consciousness, self-awareness, introspection, on-chip self-monitoring, language, planning, or AGI
mechanism_rows.current_claim: v2.1 bounded host-side reliability monitor predicts primary-path error/hazard risk and improves confidence-gated behavior
mechanism_rows.current_location: host diagnostic monitor and confidence-gated fallback
mechanism_rows.required_bridge_work: compute monitor features only from pre-feedback/binned state; log confidence before outcome; verify sham monitors in hardware-compatible capsule

mechanism_rows.claim_boundary: not native eligibility and not part of the v2.1 claim unless future gates pass
mechanism_rows.current_claim: parked unless Tier 5.9c recheck and later integration gate pass
mechanism_rows.required_bridge_work: do not port until macro trace beats shuffled/zero controls and v2.1 integration preserves guardrails

mechanism_rows.claim_boundary: not hardware temporal coding until a temporal hardware probe passes
mechanism_rows.current_claim: software temporal CRA uses latency/burst/interval structure under diagnostics
mechanism_rows.required_bridge_work: ensure temporal codes are delivered inside chunks and read back with bin resolution fine enough to preserve timing controls

recommended_sequence: Run Tier 5.9c first; keep macro eligibility parked unless it passes and later integration is clean.
Run Tier 4.20b one-seed v2.1 chunked hardware probe using delayed/context/predictive mechanisms only; no macro eligibility unless promoted.
If 4.20b passes, run Tier 4.20c three-seed repeat on the smallest v2.1 capsule.
Only after returned hardware evidence is clean, design Tier 4.21 hybrid/native eligibility or on-chip memory prototypes for the mechanisms that actually mattered.

tier: Tier 4.20a - v2.1 Hardware Transfer Readiness Audit
